sections.sectionTitle: Job A Kigentelna leh Pasian in A San'na

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in Topa dawng a
“ Topa aw, vangliatna khempeuh na neihna, na hihnop khempeuh na hih theihna thu ka thei hi
Kei bangmah a theilo kimlai, ‘Bang hangin ka pilna hong dem ngam na hi hiam?’ na hong ci hi. Keimah in ka tel zawhloh thute, kei-a' dingin a lamdanglua thu a gengen ka hi hi
Thu na gen laitakin ka na ngaihna ding, na thugente kong dawn' ding, na hong gen hi
Nidangin mi' gensawn bekin nang ka hong thei a, tu-in keima mit mahmah tawh nang ka hong mu ta hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka paunasate khempeuh hangin ka maizum mahmah a, tu-in vutlevai khu-in nakpi takin ka kisik hi,” a ci hi

Topa in hih thute khempeuh Job tungah a gen khit ciangin, Teman khua mi Elifaz kiangah, “Ka nasempa Job bangin, keima thu na gen ding uh a kilawm bangin genlo na hih manun, nang leh na lawmte gel tungah ka heh hi

Tu-in bawngtal sagih leh tuutal sagih la-in Job kiangah paipih un la, note-a' dingin biakpiakna-in nei un. Job in note-a' dingin thu hong ngetsak ding a, keimah in ama thungetna ka pia ding hi. Note' haina zahin kong minsiasak kei ding hi. Note in Job' gen bangin keima thu a manin na gen kei uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' sawl bangin Elifaz, Bildad, leh Zofar gamta uh a, Topa in Job' thungetna a pia hi.
Job in a lawm thumte-a' ding thu a ngetsak khit ciangin, Topa in Job citheisak kik a, nidanga a neih ngeizah nihin neihsa lamsa a guan' hi

Tua ciangin Job' sanggam pasalte, a sanggam numeite, leh a lawm ngeite a inn-ah hong hawh uh a, a inn-ah pawi bawlin lungdamin a omkhawm uh hi. Topa in ama tungah a tun'sak gimnate hangin a khasiatpihnate uh genin a hanthawn uh hi. Amaute in sum leh kham zungbuh khat ciat tawh va pha uh hi
Tua thamloin Topa in Job' nuntakna a masa lam sangin a nunung lamah thupha limpiak zaw hi. Job in tuu tul sawm leh tul li, kalaoh tul guk, bawngtal kap tul khat, leh la a pi tul khat a nei hi
Amah in tapa sagih leh tanu thum neikik a
a tanu upa pen Jemimah phuak a, a nihna Keziah phuak a, a tum pen Kerenhappuk a phuak hi
Job' tanute zahin a melhoih leitungah numei dang khat zong omlo a, a pa un a sanggam pasalte uh tawh a kibangin gamh a luahkhawmsak hi
Hih hun khit ciangin Job kum za leh kum sawmli sung nungta lai a, a tute ciang bek hiloin a tu-sawnsawn ciangdong zong a mu hi
Tua khit ciangin a khan'khinin a teeksih ta hi.
